description: Deed of sale for the sale of an enslaved woman. Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 1 Nisan 1537 Seleucid, which is 31 March 1226 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides. This is a copy of T-S 13J4.2. Yiṣḥaq b. Yehuda Ibn al-Mashshāṭ, agent (wakīl) of Yeshuʿa b. Hillel Ibn Zikr, sells to Hillel b. Barakāt the enslaved woman Ḍiyāʾ, who was born into slavery (muwallad) and was brought (musayyara) to Fustat. Price: 25 dinars. Not signed. Seems to be a (good) copy made by Shelomo b. Eliyyahu. (Information from Mediterranean Society, I, pp. 433, 458, and from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: שטר מכר עבדת. מיקום: פוסטאט. מתוארך: שלישי, 1 ניסן 1537 סלאוקי = 31 מרץ 1226, בסמכות אברהם מיימוני. יצחק ב' יהודה מוכר לילל ב' ברכאת את העבדת ד'יאא, מולדת בשבי. מחיר: 25 דינרים.
